strategy: quantile breakout (enter on quantile break, exit at 50%)

admitted_15min_factors.name: astack_of_consistency_352
admitted_15min_factors.note: CLV consistency: mean(CLV,352)/std(CLV,352). Close-location-value signal-to-noise ratio.

admitted_15min_factors.name: astack_vc_prop_minmax
admitted_15min_factors.note: 1m vol-confirm proportion (480-bar/5d), min-max normalized (3000-bar/31d). Correlation with of_consistency: 0.014. Uses 1m data.

admitted_15min_factors.name: astack_C_boost_latebias
admitted_15min_factors.note: Regime-conditioned clean struct: C × (1 + late_bias_mm). late_bias = temporal asymmetry from 1m data. Replaces standalone clean_struct_persist. Corr with A: -0.07, B: +0.12. Uses 1m data.

admitted_15min_factors.name: astack_rf_range_break_shape
admitted_15min_factors.note: Range breakout response shape: SR4-SR1 (4-bar vs 1-bar continuation rate after breakout). Measures whether breakout momentum is building or fading. Fully orthogonal: corr A=-0.01, B=+0.08, D=+0.006. Pure OHLC.

admitted_15min_factors.name: astack_rf_bo_neg_entropy3
admitted_15min_factors.note: Breakout response consistency: negative 3-class entropy of breakout outcomes (cont/rev/flat). Low entropy = predictable response. Orthogonal to shape (corr=0.02). Corr A=0.10, B=0.16, D=-0.08. Pure OHLC.

final_criteria: every year positive + val/test positive + at least 2 quantiles pass
